name: Deshi Shahi Cow
description: Healthy deshi cow suitable for Qurbani. Raised in a natural farm environment with regular care, proper feeding, and maintained in good health condition to ensure quality meat.

name: Sahiwal Cow
description: Premium Sahiwal breed, large and strong. Well-maintained with a balanced diet and proper farm care, known for its strong body structure and high-quality meat production.

name: Black Bengal Goat
description: Small but very popular goat for Qurbani. Known for its excellent meat quality and high demand, raised with proper care and healthy feeding practices.

name: Jamunapari Goat
description: Large-sized goat with good growth. Attractive appearance with a strong body, raised in a healthy farm environment and suitable for premium buyers.

name: Hybrid Bull
description: Large and strong bull. Crossbred for better growth and higher meat yield, maintained with proper nutrition and consistent farm care.

name: Deshi Goat
description: A good option for a low budget. Healthy local goat raised with regular feeding and care, suitable for Qurbani within an affordable price range.

name: Friesian Cow
description: Large foreign breed cow. Holstein Friesian known for its big size and premium quality, raised with proper feeding and farm supervision.

name: Red Chittagong Cow
description: A popular local breed in Bangladesh. Strong and healthy cow with good meat quality, raised under proper care and balanced nutrition.

name: Boer Goat
description: Foreign breed goat with fast growth. Known for its large size and premium meat production, well-maintained and raised in a controlled environment.

name: Local Bull
description: Medium-sized cow. Balanced body structure with proper care and feeding, suitable for Qurbani and general purchase needs.

name: White Goat
description: Beautiful white-colored goat. Clean and healthy with a well-maintained body, raised with proper feeding and suitable for Qurbani.

name: Brown Cow
description: Brown-colored cow. Strong and healthy with a well-balanced body, raised with consistent care and nutritious feeding practices.

name: Mini Goat
description: Small-sized goat. Compact and healthy, ideal for buyers looking for a lightweight and budget-friendly option with proper care.

name: Big Bull
description: Very large-sized cow. Strong and heavy body structure, raised with high-quality feed and proper farm management for premium buyers.

name: Spotted Goat
description: Spotted patterned goat. Attractive appearance with a healthy body, raised with proper feeding and suitable for Qurbani.

name: Premium Cow
description: Premium quality cow. Crossbreed with strong genetics, large body size, and excellent health condition, suitable for high-end buyers.

name: Grass-fed Cow
description: Raised on natural grass feed. Healthy and naturally grown with proper care, ensuring better meat quality and overall condition.

name: Healthy Goat
description: Healthy and high-quality goat. Black Bengal breed with strong body structure and excellent meat quality, raised with proper care.

name: Farm Cow
description: Raised on a farm. Well-maintained with natural feeding and consistent care, ensuring good health and suitable for Qurbani.

name: Young Goat
description: Young but healthy goat. Active and in good condition, raised with proper feeding and care, suitable for budget-conscious buyers.
